name: Nerva the Power Patron of Creation
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>創</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ネルヴァ
name_jp_tl: Nerva the Imprisoned God of Creation
desc:
3 "Artmage" monsters
Must first be either Fusion Summoned, or Special Summoned (from your Extra Deck) in Defense Position by Tributing 3 monsters with different Types. You can only Special Summon "Nerva the Power Patron of Creation(s)" once per turn. While a card is in the Field Zone, this card cannot be destroyed by card effects. Once per turn, when you activate an "Artmage" monster's effect (Quick Effect): You can make the activated effect become "Destroy all cards your opponent controls".

Once per turn, when you activate an "Artmage" monster's effect (Quick Effect): You can make the activated effect become "Destroy all cards your opponent controls".

mentions: Nerva the Power Patron of Creation
action: Tributes Fusion Materials for Contact Fusion
mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
summoning: Can be Special Summoned either by Fusion Summon or Contact Fusion
Contact Fusion without listed Fusion Materials
Special Summons itself from your Extra Deck
